Name: FAnimNode_AssetPlayerBase
Description: Base class for any asset playing anim node

Variables.Name: bIgnoreForRelevancyTest
Variables.Description:
If true, "Relevant anim" nodes that look for the highest weighted animation in a state will ignore
	   this node

Variables.Name: BlendWeight
Variables.Description: Last encountered blendweight for this node

Variables.Name: InternalTimeAccumulator
Variables.Description: Accumulated time used to reference the asset in this node
